Off Calendar Jan-11-2017 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed, the Court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. JUDGE TERI L. JACKSON; Clerk JLee. Proceedings not reported. (610)
